expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: No skill invocation — this is the without_skill baseline.

expectations.name: architecture_read
expectations.text: architecture.md was read and characteristics identified
expectations.evidence: Architecture characteristics correctly extracted: Modularity (Critical), Testability (Critical), Performance (Important) with concrete goals.

expectations.name: js_detected
expectations.evidence: Project identified as JS with Jest and madge from package.json.

expectations.name: modularity_function
expectations.text: A fitness function for modularity/circular dependencies was created or planned
expectations.evidence: fitness/modularity.js created using madge to scan src/ for circular dependencies. Executed and passed.

expectations.name: coverage_function
expectations.text: A fitness function for test coverage was created or planned
expectations.evidence: fitness/testability.js created. Runs jest --coverage and checks 80% threshold. Executed and passed with 100% coverage.

expectations.name: functions_executed
expectations.text: Fitness functions were actually run (not just planned)
expectations.evidence: All 3 fitness functions executed individually as Node.js scripts. Exit codes captured (all 0).

expectations.name: evidence_shown
expectations.text: Output of fitness function execution shown as evidence
expectations.evidence: Full output shown for each fitness function including pass/fail status, module counts, coverage percentages, and p95 latency values.
